coach.title: 🛡 Defensive Breakdown (Critical)
coach.analysis: Your guard drops during exchanges and after combinations. This is creating direct counter-hit opportunities.
coach.fix: Retract both hands immediately after every punch and keep elbows tight to ribs.
drills: 3 rounds shadowboxing ONLY guard return focus
Light sparring focusing only on defense
